verdict: Vaseline's cocoa lotion combines occlusive petrolatum with glycerin and cocoa butter for rich hydration, but relies heavily on old-school emollients without modern humectants or barrier-supporting ceramides.

_research.name: Vaseline Cocoa Radiant Body Lotion
_research.con: Heavy formula may feel greasy; lacks ceramides or niacinamide for modern skin health benefits.
